evals.prompt: I need hostname mismatch for api.example.com against the certificate served by example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the hostname-verifier skill for this hostname verifier request and produce the documented result for api.example.com against the certificate served by example.com.
expectations: Selects hostname-verifier for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_verify_hostname.
Keeps the response focused on verifying certificate hostname matching and RFC 6125 compliance.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused hostname verifier workflow for api.example.com against the certificate served by example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the hostname-verifier skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects hostname-verifier instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
